overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player character moves from a narrow vending machine alley onto rain-slicked streets, passing pedestrians and towering skyscrapers with heavy atmospheric haze and reflective wet surfaces.

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage toward the street, passing illuminated vending machines on the left

elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street ahead
tall modern building with glass facade and blue neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow alleyway lined with glowing vending machines under a red BUBBLETEA sign. The player walks forward toward an opening where an elevated overpass crosses above a city street, with two pedestrians approaching from the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: After exiting the alley, the player turns left onto a covered sidewalk beside a modern glass office building with horizontal neon lighting. Pedestrians sit on concrete benches to the right while various shop signs glow in purple and red hues along the walkway.

segments.scene_description: The player walks beneath an elevated highway structure lined with bright orange safety barriers on the right. Overhead neon lights illuminate the path while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance, and a yellow vendor kiosk stands near the barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with food stalls and construction activity

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower market street with food stalls on the right and construction materials on the left. Palm trees and stacked cardboard boxes line the walkway while construction workers in yellow vests stand near the stalls, and an elevated pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead.

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a wet street at an intersection, yielding to a passing sedan before approaching a building with a prominent vertical DRINK sign. Parked motorcycles with glowing wheels line the left side while traffic lights hang above the crosswalk, and neon storefronts illuminate the approaching corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cramped, neon-lit alleyway into the expansive, rain-slicked streets of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving past glowing vending machines under a red bubble tea sign, heading toward an opening where an elevated overpass looms above the city. As the camera exits the alley and turns left, the environment shifts to a covered sidewalk beside a glass office building, passing purple and red shop signs and pedestrians resting on concrete benches. The path then leads beneath a highway structure marked by bright orange safety barriers and a yellow kiosk before narrowing into a market street filled with food stalls, palm trees, and construction workers. Finally, the camera crosses a wet intersection, yielding to a passing sedan and moving past motorcycles with glowing wheels toward a building marked by a prominent vertical drink sign.
